g.text: PAGE OBJECT MODEL · UIAUTOMATOR2 · ALLURE REPORTING
Login → rules → 3 rounds (score + WE + They members each)
Login with valid credentials — assert success
Login with invalid email test@outloo.com (negative test)
Round 1 with invalid short username "E" — validation gate
3 empty rounds → back navigation edge case
